title: Replace logo with uploaded 'logo black.png' image

requirements.summary: Replace existing logo in Header and Footer with the new transparent black logo image
acceptanceCriteria: The uploaded logo image is saved as dhimayu-logo-black.dim_400x400.png in frontend/public/assets/generated/
Header.tsx references dhimayu-logo-black.dim_400x400.png instead of the previous logo file
Footer.tsx references dhimayu-logo-black.dim_400x400.png instead of the previous logo file
No background color, bg-* class, or container box is applied behind the logo image in either Header or Footer
The logo renders with full transparency, blending seamlessly with the header and footer background surfaces
The yin-yang shape, both dots, and 'Dhi'/'MayU' text are clearly visible at the displayed size

file_operations.description: Update the logo image reference to use frontend/public/assets/generated/dhimayu-logo-black.dim_400x400.png instead of the current logo file. Remove any bg-* Tailwind classes or container elements wrapping the logo to ensure it renders transparently against the header background. Set appropriate width/height attributes so the yin-yang shape, both dots, and 'Dhi'/'MayU' text remain clearly legible.

Update the logo image reference to use frontend/public/assets/generated/dhimayu-logo-black.dim_400x400.png instead of the current logo file. Remove any bg-* Tailwind classes or container elements wrapping the logo to ensure it renders transparently against the footer background. Set appropriate width/height attributes so the yin-yang shape, both dots, and 'Dhi'/'MayU' text remain clearly legible.
